item.title: Has Power Finance Corporation Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Power Finance Corporation Ltd has declared a 32% dividend, amounting to ₹4 per share, with an ex-date of March 23, 2026. The company has demonstrated strong performance, with total returns ranging from 8.54% over 6 months to 421.63% over 4 years. Time: Mar 18 2026 11:31 PM IST

item.title: Has India Glycols Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, India Glycols Ltd has declared a dividend of 150%, amounting to ₹5 per share, with an ex-date of March 23, 2026. The company has demonstrated strong total returns across various periods, with a notable 306.65% total return over the last 5 years. Time: Mar 18 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has Kama Holdings Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Kama Holdings Ltd has declared a 232% dividend, with an ex-date of March 20, 2026. While recent total returns have been negative over shorter periods, longer-term returns show significant growth, particularly a 160.64% total return over five years. Time: Mar 18 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Hitachi Energy Joins Mojo Stocks List on Strong Financial Momentum
item.description: Hitachi Energy, a mid-cap player in the heavy electrical equipment sector, has been added to the prestigious Mojo Stocks list as of 18 March 2026, reflecting its robust financial performance and bullish technical momentum. The company’s recent quarterly results and strategic positioning make it a compelling addition for investors seeking growth in the industrial equipment space. Time: Mar 18 2026 08:50 PM IST

item.title: Sambhaav Media Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Sambhaav Media Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term prospects. Time: Mar 18 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: Tera Software Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Tera Software Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development suggests a potential shift towards a bearish trend, raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term momentum and signalling possible deterioration in its price trajectory. Time: Mar 18 2026 06:20 PM IST
